title: Bridge Essay: Abrupt and spontaneous strategy switches emerge in simple regularised neural net

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Knowledge/Gnosis** (Phase 14) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Knowledge/Gnosis to mechanistic neuroscience through Abrupt, and, spontaneous, strategy, switches.

**Abrupt and spontaneous strategy switches emerge in simple regularised neural networks.** — PLoS Comput Biol. PMID: 39432516. DOI: 10.1371/journal.pcbi.1012505. Humans sometimes have an insight that leads to asudden and drastic performance improvement on the task they are working on. Sudden strategy adaptations are often linked to insights, considered to be aunique aspect of human cognition tied to complex processes such as creativity or meta-cognitive reasoning. Here, we take alearning perspective and ask whether insight-like behaviour can occur in simple artificial neural networks, even when the models only learn to form input-output associations t
